lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.
Note: a 2025 overhaul expanded the site to nine data points and boosted yields; the Live coordinate (-54.37, -50.35) supersedes the older pre-4.0 figure.

sources.label: r/EliteDangerous
sources.what: Overhead scan-path map of the crash site reproduced in Section 4 — most efficient SRV route across the data points.

sources.label: Redshift
sources.what: Encoded-data farming walkthrough — SRV turret scan routine and relog reset.

sources.label: Texter
sources.what: Jameson crashed-Cobra data-farming reference — scan points and the four encoded drops.

sources.label: Inara logbook
sources.what: Commander writeup of farming encoded engineering mats at the crash site.

sources.label: AXI Wiki
sources.what: Encoded-material gathering and the trade-down / sideways conversion method.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: John Jameson crash site (HIP 12099 1 B), data points, and encoded-material salvage.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Tutorial on farming high-grade encoded materials at Jameson's Crash Site: SRV turret scan loop, relog reset, and trader conversion.
